testcase.name: test_02_admin_get_all_accounts

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'accounts': [{'account_number': 'ACC749852150239', 'balance': 2995000, 'bic': 'ATSLEW22', 'created_at': None, ...}, {'account_number': 'ACC840779930886', 'balance': 3021600, 'bic': 'ATSLWE55', 'created_at': None, ...}, {'account_number': 'ACC171409071022', 'balance': 0, 'bic': 'CFTEMTM1XXX', 'created_at': None, ...}, {'account_number': 'ACC282479150590', 'balance': 9499611, 'bic': 'ECOMES12344', 'created_at': None, ...}, {'account_number': 'ACC290806929702', 'balance': 13208824, 'bic': 'BCYPCY2NXXX', 'created_at': None, ...}, {'account_number': 'ACC660288963076', 'balance': 9248722, 'bic': 'BCYPCY2N', 'created_at': None, ...}, ...], 'pagination': {'has_next': True, 'has_prev': False, 'limit': 50, 'page': 1, ...}}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_full_system_check.py:218: in test_02_admin_get_all_accounts assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'accounts': [{'account_number': 'ACC749852150239', 'balance': 2995000, 'bic': 'ATSLEW22', 'created_at': None, ...}, {'account_number': 'ACC840779930886', 'balance': 3021600, 'bic': 'ATSLWE55', 'created_at': None, ...}, {'account_number': 'ACC171409071022', 'balance': 0, 'bic': 'CFTEMTM1XXX', 'created_at': None, ...}, {'account_number': 'ACC282479150590', 'balance': 9499611, 'bic': 'ECOMES12344', 'created_at': None, ...}, {'account_number': 'ACC290806929702', 'balance': 13208824, 'bic': 'BCYPCY2NXXX', 'created_at': None, ...}, {'account_number': 'ACC660288963076', 'balance': 9248722, 'bic': 'BCYPCY2N', 'created_at': None, ...}, ...], 'pagination': {'has_next': True, 'has_prev': False, 'limit': 50, 'page': 1, ...}}, list)

testcase.name: test_01_admin_get_transfers

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'data': [{'admin_action_at': '2026-02-17T10:30:22.593000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 11400000, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': None, 'admin_action_by': None, 'amount': 22295400, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-17T10:14:21.257000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 19923500, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-16T09:01:41.274000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 500000, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-16T11:45:38.746000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 65578800, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-16T08:15:16.208000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 11235000, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, ...], 'ok': True}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_full_system_check.py:234: in test_01_admin_get_transfers assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'data': [{'admin_action_at': '2026-02-17T10:30:22.593000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 11400000, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': None, 'admin_action_by': None, 'amount': 22295400, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-17T10:14:21.257000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 19923500, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-16T09:01:41.274000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 500000, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-16T11:45:38.746000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 65578800, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-16T08:15:16.208000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 11235000, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, ...], 'ok': True}, list)

testcase.name: test_01_admin_get_card_requests

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'data': [{'account_id': 'bank_acc_6971fed2ad8ed4d326f04041', 'card_type': 'DEBIT_PHYSICAL', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T10:43:58.381000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, {'account_id': 'bank_acc_697b9250301a0bf9f3ab1aab', 'card_type': 'VIRTUAL', 'created_at': '2026-01-30T16:52:32.243000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, {'account_id': 'bank_acc_697b9250301a0bf9f3ab1aab', 'card_type': 'DEBIT_PHYSICAL', 'created_at': '2026-01-30T16:57:06.658000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, {'account_id': 'bank_acc_697c9670c763b276d84f898b', 'card_type': 'DEBIT_PHYSICAL', 'created_at': '2026-02-02T09:59:44.357000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, {'account_id': 'bank_acc_69849c8a5f44937c9f4a67f3', 'card_type': 'DEBIT_PHYSICAL', 'created_at': '2026-02-05T23:18:24.557000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, {'account_id': 'bank_acc_6989b03983c07a4c08ef3255', 'card_type': 'VIRTUAL', 'created_at': '2026-02-10T13:48:37.985000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, ...], 'ok': True}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_full_system_check.py:262: in test_01_admin_get_card_requests assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'data': [{'account_id': 'bank_acc_6971fed2ad8ed4d326f04041', 'card_type': 'DEBIT_PHYSICAL', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T10:43:58.381000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, {'account_id': 'bank_acc_697b9250301a0bf9f3ab1aab', 'card_type': 'VIRTUAL', 'created_at': '2026-01-30T16:52:32.243000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, {'account_id': 'bank_acc_697b9250301a0bf9f3ab1aab', 'card_type': 'DEBIT_PHYSICAL', 'created_at': '2026-01-30T16:57:06.658000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, {'account_id': 'bank_acc_697c9670c763b276d84f898b', 'card_type': 'DEBIT_PHYSICAL', 'created_at': '2026-02-02T09:59:44.357000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, {'account_id': 'bank_acc_69849c8a5f44937c9f4a67f3', 'card_type': 'DEBIT_PHYSICAL', 'created_at': '2026-02-05T23:18:24.557000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, {'account_id': 'bank_acc_6989b03983c07a4c08ef3255', 'card_type': 'VIRTUAL', 'created_at': '2026-02-10T13:48:37.985000+00:00', 'decided_at': None, ...}, ...], 'ok': True}, list)
